Call Us: 1-800-VERIZON Buy now
Verizon Prepaid | Get it fast. Free 2-day shipping with a new line. | Details
Order and get it in 2 business days when you order online Monday through Friday by 8 PM EST or Saturday by 2 PM EST. Orders placed after 2 PM Saturday EST will be delivered on Wednesday. Free 3-5 day ground shipping on upgrade orders or orders containing batteries. Available for purchases placed on verizon.com for delivery within the U.S. only, excluding Alaska and Hawaii.
